faq.title: What to know before we start

items.question: How long does a project take?
items.answer: It depends on scope, but we start with a clear plan and delivery schedule before writing code.

items.question: Can the content be edited later?
items.answer: Yes. We can connect the site to a dashboard or Supabase for easy service, project, and message management.

items.question: Is the website mobile friendly?
items.answer: Yes, the interface is designed to work smoothly on mobile, tablet, and desktop screens.
